mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dollar_index (record_date, close_price, record_time) VALUES (#{recordDate}, #{closePrice}, #{recordTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, close_price AS closePrice FROM dollar_index ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, close_price AS closePrice FROM dollar_index WHERE YEAR(record_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(record_date) = #{month} ORDER BY record_date DESC
